mapper.select: SELECT id, comment_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_comment_reaction WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, comment_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_comment_reaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, comment_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_comment_reaction WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
